note: Daily figures are estimates based on 4-day totals from OSINT reporting. Per-day breakdown unavailable; distribution assumed approximately equal. Update daily_log with confirmed announced figures as available.

daily_log.label: Day 1 — Op Epic Fury opens
daily_log.notes: UAE 137 BM+209 dr, Bahrain 45 BM+9 dr, Qatar 65 BM+12 dr, Kuwait 97 BM+283 dr. Long War Journal / Critical Threats.

daily_log.label: Day 2 — drone surge
daily_log.notes: UAE 28 BM+332 dr+2 CM, Bahrain 136 dr. CNN / Critical Threats.

daily_log.label: Day 3 — Hormuz closure
daily_log.notes: Estimated: UAE cumulative increase 9 BM+148 dr+6 CM, single strikes Bahrain/Qatar. Unconfirmed.

daily_log.label: Day 4 — Sheikh Isa / consulate strikes
daily_log.notes: UAE MoD confirmed 11 BM+123 dr intercepted Mar 3. Saudi: 2 BM (embassy+refinery). Partially confirmed.

depletion.uae_resupply_status: Likely resupplied by US; Bloomberg window Mar 7-10 may be extended
depletion.bloomberg_assessment: ~1 week to depletion at current rate (Bloomberg, Mar 2)
depletion.uae_official_position: Officially denies depletion concern; claims 'robust strategic stockpile'
depletion.impact_if_degraded: If intercept rate drops 95% → 80%: ~8-9 BM impacts/day in populated areas vs current ~2/day (~4x civilian casualty increase)
depletion.notes: 186 BMs confirmed fired (cumulative). Bloomberg window Mar 7-10 still operative. Intercept rate holding at ~92%.

intercept_stats.source: UAE Ministry of Defense / Grok report 2026-03-03
